name: Halloween Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add and blend in powdered sugar after each addition of butter.
3. Add egg whites, then continue adding powdered sugar alternately with 2 tablespoons of cream until the frosting reaches a spreading consistency.
4. Beat the frosting until it is smooth.
5. Stir in vanilla extract and salt.
6. Divide the frosting into two parts.
7. To one part, add orange coloring to create an orange hue for decorating between cake layers and reserve about 1/4 for pumpkin decorations on top.
8. To the remaining frosting, add melted chocolate and then add the 4 tablespoons of cream until it is ready for spreading.
9. Spread the chocolate frosting over the top and sides of the cake.
10. Decorate the top with a jack-o'-lantern made from orange-tinted frosting.
This recipe makes enough frosting to cover two cakes that are each 9 inches in diameter, as well as providing frosting for decorating purposes.
